summary: Comprehensive testing of Racing San Gabriel A.D.C. website with real club data. Backend APIs working perfectly (51/51 tests passed). Frontend displays real club data correctly. All 14 team categories shown. Contact form functional. Minor admin session management issue identified.

integration_issues.issue: Admin session expires quickly, making it difficult to navigate between admin sections

passed_tests: GET /api/settings returns real club data (phone +34 617 50 27 80, email racingsangabrieladc@hotmail.com, address Carrer Racing San Gabriel 39)
Homepage loads with Racing San Gabriel A.D.C. in header
Contact section shows real address, phone, email
All 14 team categories displayed on homepage
Social feed section renders on homepage
All CRUD operations for news, teams, matches, gallery
Settings update including social media fields
